meaning: n.货物空运,货物空运费vt.空运
examples: I suppose the main advantage of airfreight is speed.
Most fruit is sent overseas by airfreight in order to save time.
The business deadline is very short so we will have to send out goods by airfreight.
The company reported weakness in the international airfreight market and provided a downbeat current-quarter earnings outlook.
Many businesses that depended on air travel or airfreight were suddenly surprised.
